events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's legendary guitarist, songwriter, and astrophysicist Sir Brian May was born on July 19, 1947.

angles.name: Guitar God
angles.copy: Happy 79th Birthday to the one and only Sir Brian May! What's your favourite Queen guitar solo?

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The iconic frontman of The Rolling Stones, Sir Mick Jagger, was born on July 26, 1943.

angles.name: Moves Like Jagger
angles.copy: 83 years young and still moving like Jagger! Happy Birthday to the legendary Rolling Stones frontman, Mick Jagger.

events.title: MTV launched in 1981
events.blurb: Music Television (MTV) officially launched on August 1, 1981, with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' being the very first music video ever broadcast.

angles.name: Video Killed The Radio Star
angles.copy: Remember when MTV actually played music videos? On this day in 1981, MTV launched, changing music forever. What was the first video you remember seeing?

events.title: Oasis' 'Definitely Maybe' turns 32
events.blurb: Oasis released their seminal debut album 'Definitely Maybe' on August 29, 1994, featuring classics like 'Live Forever' and 'Supersonic'.

angles.name: Definitely a Classic
angles.copy: 32 years since Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe' – the album that kicked off a Britpop revolution. What's your top track from the record?

events.title: Woodstock Festival anniversary
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Music & Art Fair took place from August 15–18, 1969, becoming a pivotal moment in music history.

angles.name: Peace, Love & Music
angles.copy: 57 years since half a million people descended on a dairy farm for three days of peace, love, and music. What's your favourite Woodstock performance?

events.title: Remembering Elvis Presley
events.blurb: August 16, 2026 marks 49 years since the passing of the King of Rock and Roll, Elvis Presley, who would have been 91 this year.

angles.name: The King Lives On
angles.copy: 49 years today since the world lost the King of Rock & Roll. Elvis Presley's legacy continues to inspire generations.

events.title: Remembering Tupac Shakur
events.blurb: On September 13, 1996, influential rapper Tupac Shakur passed away in Las Vegas at the age of 25. He would have been 55 this year.

angles.name: Legacy of Pac
angles.copy: Remembering the profound impact of Tupac Shakur, whose music and words continue to resonate 30 years on.

events.title: Remembering Jimi Hendrix
events.blurb: September 18, 2026 marks 56 years since the passing of guitar legend Jimi Hendrix, who would have been 84 this year.

angles.name: Guitar Legend
angles.copy: 56 years ago, we lost a true visionary. Jimi Hendrix's unparalleled talent continues to shape music.

events.title: The Beatles' 'Abbey Road' anniversary
events.blurb: The Beatles' iconic 'Abbey Road' album was released in the UK on September 26, 1969, and in the US on October 1, 1969.

angles.name: That Iconic Crossing
angles.copy: It's 57 years since The Beatles gave us 'Abbey Road', an album as iconic as its zebra crossing cover. What's your favourite track?

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: The Pretenders' formidable frontwoman, Chrissie Hynde, was born on September 7, 1951.

angles.name: Pretenders Icon
angles.copy: Happy 75th Birthday to the incredible Chrissie Hynde! A true rock icon whose influence continues to shine.

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: Oasis and Beady Eye frontman Liam Gallagher was born on September 21, 1972.

angles.name: Mad for It
angles.copy: Happy 54th Birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher! Still bringing that rock'n'roll swagger. What's your favourite Liam moment?

events.title: John Lennon's 'Imagine' anniversary
events.blurb: John Lennon's timeless single 'Imagine' was released in the US on October 11, 1971.

angles.name: A Song For Peace
angles.copy: 'Imagine' all the people living life in peace... John Lennon's iconic anthem continues to inspire. What does the song mean to you?

events.title: First iPod released
events.blurb: Apple unveiled the first-generation iPod on October 23, 2001, revolutionising how we listen to music.

angles.name: Pocket Full of Tunes
angles.copy: Remember life before the iPod? 25 years ago, Apple changed personal music forever. What was on your first iPod?

events.title: James Bond Day
events.blurb: October 5th marks James Bond Day, celebrating the anniversary of the world premiere of the first Bond film, 'Dr. No,' in 1962.

angles.name: Shaken, Not Stirred
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! From iconic theme tunes to thrilling gadgets, what's your favourite Bond film or song?

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: The legendary Beatles co-founder and peace activist John Lennon was born on October 9, 1940.

angles.name: Remembering Lennon
angles.copy: On what would have been his 86th birthday, we remember the enduring legacy of John Lennon – a true musical visionary.

events.title: John Cleese turns 87
events.blurb: The iconic British comedian, actor, and writer John Cleese was born on October 27, 1939.

angles.name: Comedy Legend
angles.copy: Happy 87th Birthday to the brilliant John Cleese! From Monty Python to Fawlty Towers, a true master of British comedy.

events.title: The Beatles' 'White Album' anniversary
events.blurb: The Beatles released their self-titled double album, commonly known as 'The White Album,' on November 22, 1968.

angles.name: The White Album
angles.copy: The Beatles' 'White Album' is 58 years old this month. A sprawling masterpiece that showcased their diverse talents. What's your favourite track?
